items.title: Analysis: recent open weight models lag frontier closed models' cyber capabilities by 4 to 7 months, a narrower gap than the 6 to 10 months through most of 2025 (AI Security Institute)

items.title_en: Analysis: recent open weight models lag frontier closed models' cyber capabilities by 4 to 7 months, a narrower gap than the 6 to 10 months through most of 2025 (AI Security Institute)
items.title_zh: 分析：最近的开放权重模型滞后于前沿封闭模型的网络能力 4 到 7 个月，差距比 2025 年大部分时间的 6 到 10 个月要窄（AI 安全研究所）
items.title_bilingual: 分析：最近的开放权重模型滞后于前沿封闭模型的网络能力 4 到 7 个月，差距比 2025 年大部分时间的 6 到 10 个月要窄（AI 安全研究所） / Analysis: recent open weight models lag frontier closed models' cyber capabilities by 4 to 7 months, a narrower gap than the 6 to 10 months through most of 2025 (AI Security Institute)

items.title: China's National Data Administration says the country's daily AI token consumption hit 140T in March 2026, up from 100T in December 2025 and 100B in early 2024 (Minxiao Chang/South China Morning Post)
items.title_original: China's National Data Administration says the country's daily AI token consumption hit 140T in March 2026, up from 100T in December 2025 and 100B in early 2024 (Minxiao Chang/South China Morning Post)
items.title_en: China's National Data Administration says the country's daily AI token consumption hit 140T in March 2026, up from 100T in December 2025 and 100B in early 2024 (Minxiao Chang/South China Morning Post)
items.title_zh: 中国国家数据管理局表示，2026 年 3 月，中国每日 AI 代币消费量达到 140T，高于 2025 年 12 月的 100T 和 2024 年初的 100B（Minxiao Chang/南华早报）
items.title_bilingual: 中国国家数据管理局表示，2026 年 3 月，中国每日 AI 代币消费量达到 140T，高于 2025 年 12 月的 100T 和 2024 年初的 100B（Minxiao Chang/南华早报） / China's National Data Administration says the country's daily AI token consumption hit 140T in March 2026, up from 100T in December 2025 and 100B in early 2024 (Minxiao Chang/South China Morning Post)

items.title_bilingual: 数据基础设施初创公司 Cribl 收购了 CardinalOps，该公司提供人工智能驱动的威胁检测工具，并已筹集 4000 万美元，消息人士称筹集了约 1 亿美元（Meir Orbach/CTech） / Data infrastructure startup Cribl acquires CardinalOps, which offers AI-powered threat detection tools and had raised $40M, sources say for around $100M (Meir Orbach/CTech)
